svg.title: Captivate future-state service blueprint hypothesis
svg.desc: A proposed future-state service blueprint informed by stakeholder walkthroughs and product research. Backstage operations, systems, ownership and measures require further validation.
svg.text: From early visit intent to coordinated service delivery and change recovery
Research-informed proposal. Backstage processes, ownership, integrations and measures require validation.

g.text: Status tags in the left lane identify the confidence level of each row.
Intent may begin 2 months–2 days out.
Submit before every detail is known.
Use one current source of truth.
Display next actions and due information.
Avoid defaulting every request to a call.
Lead time confused with response time;
Wrong counts or services become detached
Questions move to email/chat and lose
Overall status hides one unconfirmed or
Every owner is contacted manually and
Attach each clarification to the exact
Explain impact before saving and reopen

svg.text: Future-state hypothesis · Research-backed frontstage findings are separated from inferred and validation-needed operational assumptions.
